meta.title: Privacy Policy | Prayaan Capital
meta.description: Prayaan Capital's privacy policy — how we collect, use, and protect your data.

sections.headline: 1. Data We Collect
sections.body: We collect personal identification information (name, mobile, email, Aadhaar, PAN), financial information (bank statements, ITR), property information, and device/usage data (IP address, browser type, pages visited).

sections.headline: 2. How We Use Your Data
sections.body: Your data is used for credit assessment and loan processing; KYC verification as required by RBI; communicating about your account; regulatory reporting to RBI, credit bureaus (CIBIL, Experian, CRIF), and statutory bodies; improving our products.

sections.headline: 3. Data Security
sections.body: We implement 256-bit SSL encryption, access controls, and regular security audits. All data is stored on servers in India in compliance with applicable data localisation requirements.

sections.headline: 4. Third-Party Sharing
sections.body: We share data only with credit bureaus, co-lending partners where applicable, statutory authorities as required by law, and technology service providers under strict data processing agreements. We do not sell your personal data.

sections.headline: 5. Your Rights
sections.body: You have the right to access, correct, or request deletion of your personal data subject to applicable law and regulatory retention requirements. Write to dpo@prayaancapital.com.

sections.headline: 6. Contact
sections.body:
Data Protection Officer
Prayaan Capital Private Limited
Head Office, Chennai – 600XXX
Email: dpo@prayaancapital.com
